title: Table extension adding a field to a standard table
instruction: Extend the standard Microsoft table CustGroup in the sandbox model by adding one new field: NotePriority, backed by an existing standard EDT (use suggest_edt / the index to pick an appropriate integer or string EDT — do NOT invent a new EDT). Add the new field to a field group so it surfaces on forms. Do NOT modify any base-table field. The result must be a CustGroup table extension (CustGroup.<Prefix>Extension) that builds clean.
